name: banque-familiale
description: PWA de gestion d'argent de poche familial

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c yellow,blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api --if-present && npm run test -w apps/web --if-present
